title: Provincial “Ideological Liberation” Campaign Calls for “Unswerving Alignment” with Xi Jinping
description: A provincial campaign to jumpstart cadres out of timidity and “formalism” raised hackles online for framing “ideological liberation” as adherence to Xi ...
